map_ground: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128"><g id="ground"><line x1="64" y1="0" x2="64" y2="72" stroke="#726c60" stroke-width="13" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="64" y1="0" x2="64" y2="72" stroke="#9c968a" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="68" y1="64" x2="128" y2="64" stroke="#726c60" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="68" y1="64" x2="128" y2="64" stroke="#9c968a" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="64" y1="70" x2="64" y2="128" stroke="#726c60" stroke-width="13" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="64" y1="70" x2="64" y2="128" stroke="#9c968a" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/><ellipse cx="64" cy="70" rx="40" ry="33" fill="#a29b8b"/><ellipse cx="46" cy="58" rx="4" ry="3" fill="#8f887a" opacity="0.8"/><ellipse cx="58" cy="64" rx="5" ry="3" fill="#b0a999" opacity="0.7"/><ellipse cx="74" cy="60" rx="4" ry="3" fill="#8f887a" opacity="0.8"/><ellipse cx="84" cy="70" rx="5" ry="3" fill="#b0a999" opacity="0.7"/><ellipse cx="50" cy="78" rx="5" ry="3" fill="#8f887a" opacity="0.8"/><ellipse cx="70" cy="82" rx="4" ry="3" fill="#b0a999" opacity="0.7"/><ellipse cx="80" cy="88" rx="5" ry="3" fill="#8f887a" opacity="0.8"/><ellipse cx="56" cy="92" rx="4" ry="3" fill="#b0a999" opacity="0.7"/><ellipse cx="88" cy="78" rx="4" ry="3" fill="#8f887a" opacity="0.75"/><ellipse cx="42" cy="70" rx="4" ry="3" fill="#b0a999" opacity="0.7"/></g><g id="water"/></svg>
scene_description: La Plaza de la colonia Umbral bajo un cielo ocre: losas de hormigón, el mástil de comunicaciones y los puestos del mercado de intercambio. La avenida norte baja desde los bloques de vivienda y la cantina El Filtro abre su puerta al oeste.
